name: Mystery Escape
short_description: Dive into an adventure, alone, with your friends or play with random people. Solve various puzzles and overcome all the traps. There are currently 5 different rooms in which you can prove yourself. More and more rooms will be added in permanent updates. I hope to see you on the other side.
detailed_description:
Dive into an adventure, alone, with up to 4 friends or play with random people. Solve various puzzles and overcome all the traps. There are currently 5 different rooms in which you can prove yourself.


The 5 rooms are:
"Trapped in the basement", where you have to find the vault and unlock it. You will then find the key to freedom in the vault.

"Cinema Escape" Find out how you can escape from the cinema. Let your creativity run wild and find a solution.

"Temple Escape" You find yourself in an old temple. There you have to solve puzzles to bring the moon and the sun back together so that you can escape.

"Up in space" You find yourself on a space station and must somehow manage to open the door to the outside.

"The secrets of the Egyptians" You are in an Egyptian pyramid and have to get into the large burial chamber so that you can escape from there.

"Horror Escape" This is a horror escape room map that will come out a few weeks after the release.



There are various puzzles in different subject areas. For some you need to have a good imagination and for others good instincts, combination skills or dexterity. I'm sure there's something for everyone. More and more rooms will be added in permanent updates. I hope to see you on the other side.
